name: Stuffed Red Snapper
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Stove Top stuffing according to the instructions on the box.
2. Chop the onion and sauté it in 2 tablespoons of oil until softened.
3. Remove the sautéed onion from the pan and transfer it to a baking dish.
4. Place the fish filet on top of the onion in the baking dish.
5. Spread the prepared stuffing over the fish filet.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
